items.title: Where would Argentina be if not for Messi? On a fl...
items.summary: Argentina's remarkable comeback win against Egypt was all down to Lionel Messi, who is seemingly dragging his team to another final.

items.title: Switzerland end 72-year World Cup quarter-final wait with dramatic 4-3 penalty shootout win over Colombia, Argentina next
items.summary: Switzerland reached the FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-finals after defeating Colombia 4-3 on penalties following a tense 0-0 draw in Vancouver. Gregor Kobel produced several cruci...

items.title: Coco Gauff vs. Karolina Muchova: Who will win
items.summary: It's a clash of firepower in this Wimbledon semifinal. Is it finally Muchova's time -- or will Gauff's experience pay off?
